title: Mark Velthoen
text: Hello! I’m Mark Velthoen, a current undergraduate student at University of California, Santa Barbara. I am studying Hydrologic Sciences and Policy and am interested in California water systems and sustainable water management. Outside of my education, I love to hike, play sports (tennis and basketball) and enjoy sunny Santa Barbara. Check out my website to learn more!
